2: And accept the persons of the wicked? Selah. Selah.
3: Do justice to the afflicted and needy.
4: Rid them them out of the hand of the wicked.
5: All the foundations of the earth are out of course.
6: And all of you are are children of the most High.
7: And fall like one of the princes.
8: For thou shalt inherit all nations.
